title: LMND Q4 Deep Dive: Accelerating Growth, Autonomous Car Insurance, and AI Investment Shape 2026 Outlook
text: LMND Q4 2024 deep dive analyzing growth acceleration, autonomous car insurance launch, and AI investment shaping 2026. In-force premium reached $944 million, 26% growth. Revenue $149 million, 29% growth. Key profitability metric: company excluding growth spend was EBITDA positive first time in Q4. Gross loss ratio improved to 63%, 14 points better year-over-year. Pet insurance became largest segment with $500M+ in-force premium run rate. Autonomous car insurance partnership with Tesla represents transformational opportunity for industry. Product rollout Arizona/Oregon with 50% rate reduction for FSD-engaged miles. Management expects significant upside if Tesla achieves wide FSD adoption. 2026 outlook: In-force premium growth 32%, revenue growth 60%+, positive EBITDA Q4 2026, GAAP profitability 2027. Cross-sell strategy: 18%+ of in-force premium from multi-policy customers. AI investment paying off: 55% of claims automated, instant or near-instant processing. Geographic expansion: 38 US states covered (92% population), 30 European countries licensed.
